description: issue #193: with only core-language active (turtle-rendering NOT in the active profile set), `forward 100` still parses cleanly at Layer 1 (the reader now knows forward's arity and groups its one argument correctly), but check() flags a clean Layer-2 semantic ol-unknown-command with a did-you-mean, never a Layer-1 structural ol-bad-token. Registering turtle primitives as *visible* when turtle-rendering IS active is issue #136's follow-up slice (checker-names.ts), not this one.
